description: Post a message to a Slack channel, direct message, or thread.

channel.description: Channel ID (e.g. C1234567890), channel name (e.g. #general), or user ID for DMs (e.g. U1234567890).

text.description: Message text. Supports Slack's mrkdwn formatting: *bold*, _italic_, ~strike~, `code`, ```code block```, >quote, <URL|label>.

thread_ts.description: Timestamp of the parent message to reply in a thread. Format: 1234567890.123456. If omitted, posts to the channel directly.

blocks.description: Array of Block Kit layout blocks for rich message formatting. Overrides text for display if provided.

unfurl_links.description: Whether to unfurl primarily text-based URLs.
